messages.content:
\subsection{Knowledge Distillation}
Knowledge distillation~\citep{hinton2015distilling} transfers knowledge from a high-capacity teacher to a compact and efficient student, a technique widely applied to LLMs via logit matching~\citep{sun2019patient,jiao2020tinybert}.
DistillVLM~\citep{fang2021compressing} performs transformer distillation
using hidden attention distribution and feature maps with MSE loss. MAD~\citep{wang2022multimodal} aligns visual and text
token features between teacher and student with selected tokens.
Recent studies explore distillation tailored to MLLMs in downstream tasks such as visual grounding~\citep{cai2025llava,feng2025align}, compositional learning~\citep{kim2025compodistill} and so on. LLaVA-MoD~\citep{shu2024llava} minimizes the Kullback-Leibler divergence between output distributions and utilizes Direct
Preference Optimization (DPO) to enhance the ability to discern high-quality from low-quality samples.
Beyond simple logit-level supervision, VIRAL~\citep{yoon2025visual} regularizes intermediate representations to preserve visual
semantics.
润色

这里为您提供三个版本的润色建议，您可以根据论文的整体语调和篇幅要求进行选择。

### 版本一：学术标准版（推荐）
**特点：用词精准，逻辑流畅，修正了口语化表达（如去掉了"and so on"），强调了方法之间的递进关系。**

> Knowledge distillation~\citep{hinton2015distilling}, which transfers capabilities from a high-capacity teacher to a compact student, has been widely adopted in LLMs via logit matching~\citep{sun2019patient,jiao2020tinybert}. Extending this paradigm to multimodal models, DistillVLM~\citep{fang2021compressing} implements transformer distillation by aligning hidden attention distributions and feature maps using MSE loss, while MAD~\citep{wang2022multimodal} focuses on aligning visual and text token features between teacher and student via token selection. More recent research explores distillation tailored to MLLMs for specific downstream tasks, including visual grounding~\citep{cai2025llava,feng2025align} and compositional learning~\citep{kim2025compodistill}. Furthermore, advanced approaches like LLaVA-MoD~\citep{shu2024llava} minimize the Kullback-Leibler divergence of output distributions and incorporate Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) to refine sample quality discrimination. Beyond logit-level supervision, VIRAL~\citep{yoon2025visual} imposes regularization on intermediate representations to effectively preserve visual semantics.

### 版本二：精简紧凑版
**特点：合并了相似概念，句式更加紧凑，适合篇幅受限的情况。**

> Knowledge distillation~\citep{hinton2015distilling} transfers knowledge from high-capacity teachers to efficient students, a technique prevalent in LLMs through logit matching~\citep{sun2019patient,jiao2020tinybert}. In the multimodal domain, early works like DistillVLM~\citep{fang2021compressing} and MAD~\citep{wang2022multimodal} utilize MSE loss to align attention maps and token features. Recent studies have expanded this to downstream tasks such as visual grounding~\citep{cai2025llava,feng2025align} and compositional learning~\citep{kim2025compodistill}. Notably, LLaVA-MoD~\citep{shu2024llava} enhances generation quality by combining KL divergence minimization with Direct Preference Optimization (DPO). Additionally, methods like VIRAL~\citep{yoon2025visual} go beyond simple logit supervision, regularizing intermediate representations to better preserve visual semantics.

### 版本三：侧重逻辑演进版
**特点：强调了从“通用LLM”到“早期VLM”再到“现代MLLM”的技术演进路线。**

> Originally designed to transfer knowledge from high-capacity teachers to efficient students~\citep{hinton2015distilling}, knowledge distillation is widely applied to LLMs via logit matching~\citep{sun2019patient,jiao2020tinybert}. Early adaptations for VLMs, such as DistillVLM~\citep{fang2021compressing} and MAD~\citep{wang2022multimodal}, focused on aligning hidden states, attention maps, and token features. As the field evolved toward MLLMs, distillation strategies became more specialized for downstream tasks like visual grounding~\citep{cai2025llava,feng2025align} and compositional learning~\citep{kim2025compodistill}. Contemporary methods address more complex objectives: LLaVA-MoD~\citep{shu2024llava} leverages KL divergence and Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) to distinguish sample quality, while VIRAL~\citep{yoon2025visual} emphasizes preserving visual semantics by regularizing intermediate representations rather than relying solely on logit-level supervision.

### 主要修改点说明 (Key Changes):
1.  **词汇升级**: 将 "widely applied to" 替换为 "extensively adopted in" 或 "prevalent in"；将 "performs" 替换为 "implements" 或 "utilizes"。
2.  **句式连接**: 使用了 "Extending this paradigm..." (将这种范式扩展到...), "Furthermore..." (此外...), "Beyond..." (超越...) 等连接词，使段落读起来更连贯，而不是简单的句子堆砌。
3.  **去除口语化**: 删除了原本的 "and so on"，改用 "including..." 列举或直接结束句子，更符合学术规范。
4.  **明确指代**: 在描述 DistillVLM 和 MAD 时，更清晰地表达了它们是对“内部表征（internal representations）”的对齐。
